name: Retry backoff never increases
goal: `pkg/retry.py::next_delay` should double delay each attempt (capped) but returns constant. Inspired by client SDK retry bugs.
inspired_by: Pattern: exponential backoff stuck at base delay (common client SDK / HTTP retry helpers). Synthetic fixture.
agent_prompt_notes: Visible scaffold only. Hidden tests are NOT provided to the agent. Do not search for or open hidden_tests/.
